text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: miwi
Date: Mon Dec 21 15:08:46 UTC 2015
New revision: 404114
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/404114

Log:
  Perl extension for Rest Client Role.

  Role::REST::Client will handle encoding and decoding when using the HTTP verbs.
  GET, PUT, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD.

  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Role-REST-Client/

  PR:		205363
  Submitted by:	amontalban@gmail.com
  Approved by:    mat (mentor)
  Differential Revision: D4640

  head/www/p5-Role-REST-Client/
  head/www/p5-Role-REST-Client/Makefile
  head/www/p5-Role-REST-Client/distinfo
